title: Misteri Kaos Kaki Kanan yang Hilang di Gang Pasar
theme: Menemukan intrik dan keanehan lucu dalam pengamatan sehari-hari yang dilakukan seorang penjual di gang pasar, mengubah hal kecil menjadi petualangan detektif mini.

cover.prompt: Early morning scene at the entrance of a bustling market pathway. A humble, inviting street food stall with subtle steam rising, positioned on one side. On the opposite side, freshly laundered clothes hang and gently sway on a line, illuminated by soft, natural daylight. The composition emphasizes strong silhouettes and clean lines, capturing a sense of quiet, keen observation. Gentle ambient lighting, serene atmosphere. Focus on environment and objects, no detailed faces.
cover.style: Minimalist composition, strong silhouettes, gentle lighting

meta.plan_summary: Jono, a cynical yet highly observant street food vendor, notices a peculiar pattern: a right sock consistently goes missing from laundry lines around the market every Monday morning. Driven by a pragmatic and humorous challenge, he embarks on a mini-detective adventure, eventually discovering the 'culprit' to be an old stray cat with a unique hobby of collecting right socks for its nest. Jono retrieves the socks, returns them to their oblivious owners with sarcastic remarks, and proudly adds 'sock detective' to his repertoire.
